finding_results.notes: Rewrote all cited clipped negation beats into syntactically complete tense lines while preserving pace and pressure.
Inserted four discrete Ina interior beats (somatic stress and tactical cognition) throughout the confrontation stretch to maintain close-third access and break external-only runs.

Staged immediate containment before legal strategy resumes: phone powered down and removed from reach, door secured with chain/keys controlled, hydration grounding, plus explicit short-horizon survival commitment in Ji-eun direct speech.
Revised Kwon voicemail now carries concrete timed consequences (22:00/22:01/09:00) and inevitability framing aligned to his calm managerial idiolect.
Replaced default flat/still shutdown construction with scene-specific tactile/sound behavior tied to train-car intimacy.

summary: All five structural/craft findings from the chapter_10 p1 packet were addressed in place with targeted rewrites: clipped-negation cleanup, restored interiority during confrontation, explicit on-page crisis containment before legal strategy, individualized Kwon pressure logic, and replacement of templated shutdown phrasing.
